name: taleseal
description: Write up a Codex session's work as a shareable tale — compose the page, draft it privately for review, publish to a short URL once you confirm.

interface.shortDescription: Write up Codex work as shareable tales
interface.longDescription: Turn this session's work into a shareable tale at a short URL: compose a readable page of blocks (headings, prose, code, diffs, tables, charts, an evidence block for sources), draft it privately behind a review URL, show it to you, and publish only after you confirm. The tale is a written-up account, never a transcript dump.
